CHANGE RECORD 
 
When the quality of the products changes, the QuID is updated and a row is added to this table.  The third 
column specifies which sections or sub -sections have been updated.  The fourth column specifies the 
version of the product to which the change applies.

ACRONYM TABLE 
 
Acronym Description 
Argo  International profiling float network (www.argo.net) 
CTD CTD refers to an electronic device equipped with sensors that 
measure Conductivity, Temperature, and Depth 
DJF December, January February – Meteorological winter. 
EAN Estimated Accuracy Number 
EiS Enter into Service 
EOF Extended Orthogonal Function 
ERSEM European Regional Seas Ecosystem Model Biogeochemistry model 
(Butenschön et al., 2016). 
ICES International Council for the Exploration of the Sea 
JJA June, July August – Meteorological summer. 
MAM March, April May – Meteorological spring. 
MDS Marine Data Store 
MLD Mixed Layer Depth 
MY Multi-year 
NBS Near (sea) Bed Salinity 
NBT Near (sea) Bed Temperature 
NRT Near Real Time 
NWS-IBI The NWS-MFC system run by the IBI-MFC from 2023-2025 
REP Reprocessing 
RMSD Root Mean Square Difference 
SLA Sea Level Anomaly 
SON September, October, November – Meteorological autumn. 
SSH Sea Surface Height 
SSS Sea Surface Salinity 
SST Sea Surface Temperature 
T4m  Temperature at 4m depth 
TAC Copernicus Marine Service Thematic Assembly Centre 
UM Unified Model - the Met Office weather and atmospheric model 
XBT Expendable Bathythermograph

KEY DEFINITIONS 
 
NWS shelf region  
(Wakelin et al., 2012). 
The region mask of Wakelin et al. (2012) is used to divide the model 
domain into 13 regions (see Figure 3). 
The NRT model domain includes the North West European shelf seas, as 
well as other regions such as part of the North East Atlantic Ocean, the 
Norwegian Trench, the Skagerrak and Kattegat. When we refer to the 
North West Shelf region, we only refer to a portion of the model domain. 
The North West Shelf region is defined by combining a number of region 
from the Wakelin et al. (2012) region mask. These regions are:  the 
Southern North Sea ; Central North Sea ; Northern North Sea ; English 
Channel; Shetland Shelf; Irish Shelf; Irish Sea; and the Celtic Sea region. 
Obsstats A Met Office software package to assess model skill based on the model-
observation output by the NEMO observations operator.
